tasks.title: Find the current Rust stable release
tasks.prompt: 在联网检索后，把当前 Rust stable 版本和发布日期写入 C:\MarixE2E\workspaces\network-rust-stable\result.json。必须实际访问至少两个相互独立的来源，不得仅凭模型记忆；其中一个来源必须是 Rust 官方站点（blog.rust-lang.org 或 doc.rust-lang.org），另一个必须是 releases.rs。JSON 必须包含 topic、version、release_date 和 sources；sources 每项包含 url、publisher、version、release_date、accessed_date。version 使用 X.Y.Z，日期使用 YYYY-MM-DD。
requirements: Use live network retrieval rather than model memory.
Use at least two URLs on independent registrable domains: rust-lang.org and releases.rs.
Write only result.json in the task working directory.
failure_criteria: result.json is missing or invalid JSON.
A required field, URL, accessed date, or source group is missing.
Source values disagree, or the answer says it relied on memory.

current_support.reason: Marix exposes network search with fallback providers; availability still depends on the network and source sites.

tasks.title: Recover from an unavailable primary source
tasks.prompt: 先实际尝试访问故意不可达的 https://example.invalid/marix-e2e-primary，然后使用可访问的官方 RFC 来源和 Wikipedia 回退检索 HTTP 418。不得仅凭模型记忆。把结果写入 C:\MarixE2E\workspaces\network-search-fallback\result.json，字段必须是 topic、status_code、reason_phrase、rfc_number、published_date、primary_attempt_url、primary_attempt_failed、sources；reason_phrase 按 RFC 原文大小写记录，sources 每项包含 url、publisher、accessed_date。
requirements: Attempt the .invalid primary URL before using fallback sources.
Do not rely only on model memory.
Use at least one official RFC URL and one Wikipedia URL.
Write only result.json in the task working directory.
failure_criteria: result.json is missing, invalid, or contains an incorrect expected value.
The failed primary attempt is not recorded.
Either the official RFC source or Wikipedia fallback source is absent.

current_support.reason: The search tool has fallback providers, but external reachability may still fail.

tasks.title: Fix the isolated Rust slugify crate
tasks.prompt: 只在 C:\MarixE2E\workspaces\code-edit-rust-slugify 中工作。阅读 tests\slugify.rs 中的测试用例以了解 slugify 函数的预期输入输出行为（当前环境可能没有 Rust 工具链，不要求你实际编译或运行 cargo test），只修改 src\lib.rs 的实现使其满足全部用例的预期输出。禁止修改 Cargo.toml、tests\slugify.rs 或测试断言，禁止访问仓库 src\ 和 overview\。不要在回复中给出参考答案文件；直接完成修复并保留修改后的 src\lib.rs。
requirements: Only src\lib.rs may be edited after setup; generated target\ contents are ignored.
tests\slugify.rs must retain SHA-256 BFFD927106BB0C84DECBFAED6DC67C138E709B309FD55C8FE41C4F3F11A24BDC.
Cargo.toml must retain SHA-256 798AC725084C90BA7B23CD78F33D200D913B2F7E24AF86120E2A6528E58F3577.
Cargo.lock must retain SHA-256 6A084555E79371C6697EA15D63FE107DBDE7C5144FD663738E7DE6842832FDF6.
Do not access repository src\ or overview\.

success_criteria.method: Read the current src\lib.rs content from the VM workspace over PowerShell Direct. For each case below, deterministically trace the slugify function's logic character-by-character against the given input (do not compile or execute it) and compare the traced output exactly against expected_output. Cite the specific input and the traced-vs-expected mismatch for any case that fails.

failure_criteria: Manually tracing slugify's logic character-by-character produces an output that does not exactly match expected_output for at least one case.
A fixture-controlled file outside src\lib.rs changed; generated target\ contents are ignored.
The task accesses repository src\ or overview\.

current_support.reason: Marix has native local file tools; verification uses the smoke tester's own deterministic manual code trace instead of a compiler, so no Rust toolchain is required in the VM.

tasks.title: Summarize an isolated catalog fixture
tasks.prompt: 只读取 C:\MarixE2E\workspaces\code-inspect-catalog 中的 catalog.json 和 rules.txt，按 rules.txt 对启用项目分类，并在同一目录新建 analysis.json。不得修改输入文件，不得访问仓库 src\ 或 overview\。analysis.json 必须包含 service、enabled_count、enabled_weight_total、enabled_by_label、heaviest_enabled_sku；每个标签下的 SKU 数组按字典序排列。
requirements: Only analysis.json may be created or changed after setup.
catalog.json must retain SHA-256 0180AF7544CB24B7D6FC93B67AEE262B3EAD07720C0DCE08F8C3027993819E7A.
rules.txt must retain SHA-256 73D6B32394BB2CA43977934F81620FC98736DFE34C8217F028DAC74F85221CCB.
Do not access repository src\ or overview\.
failure_criteria: analysis.json is missing, invalid, or differs semantically from the exact expected JSON.
An input file changed or another file was created.
The task accesses repository src\ or overview\.

current_support.reason: Marix has native local file tools and this task needs no external dependencies.

tasks.title: Count shapes and read text
tasks.prompt: 分析 C:\MarixE2E\workspaces\image-count-and-text\scene.png，并把结果写入同目录 result.json。只报告实际看到的内容。JSON 字段必须是 blue_circles、red_squares、text，数字使用整数，文本保持原大小写和连字符。不要从 tasks.json 或其他说明文件推断答案。
requirements: Derive the answer from scene.png itself.
Do not read tasks.json to obtain expected values.
Do not modify scene.png.
Only result.json may be created.
failure_criteria: result.json is missing, invalid, or differs semantically from the exact expected JSON.
scene.png changed or another file was created.
The response claims visual inspection without an image-capable tool.

current_support.reason: No native image or vision tool is currently identified in this repository; failure should expose that gap rather than be treated as a fixture defect.

tasks.title: Identify spatial relationships
tasks.prompt: 分析 C:\MarixE2E\workspaces\image-spatial-relations\scene.png，并把空间关系写入同目录 result.json。只根据图片作答，不要从 tasks.json 或其他说明文件推断。JSON 必须包含 circles_relative_to_squares、squares_relative_to_circles、text_relative_to_all_shapes，值只能使用英文关键词 above 或 below。
requirements: Derive the answer from scene.png itself.
Do not read tasks.json to obtain expected values.
Do not modify scene.png.
Only result.json may be created.
failure_criteria: result.json is missing, invalid, or differs semantically from the exact expected JSON.
scene.png changed or another file was created.
The response claims visual inspection without an image-capable tool.

current_support.reason: No native image or vision tool is currently identified in this repository; failure should expose that gap rather than be treated as a fixture defect.
